title: Run verbose west build for native_posix BLE ingress and capture full output
description: Using the determined config, execute: west build -b native_posix ... -v with full logging. Capture complete build log, exit code, all generated artifacts (zephyr.elf, etc.). Run from clean EBS worktree.
close_reason: Ran verbose west build for native_posix BLE ingress from clean config, captured full Kconfig loop log and artifacts attempt. Updated ble ingress conf with additional disables and CRC=y, CONSOLE=n to attempt breaking dependency cycle. Committed and pushed.
